org.springframework.data.mongodb.gridfs.GridFsUpload.GridFsUploadBuilder

Package
Description
org.springframework.data.mongodb.gridfs
Support for MongoDB GridFS feature.

    Method
    Description

    Set the upload chunk size in bytes.

    Create a new instance of GridFsUpload for the given InputStream.

    Set id, filename, metadata and chunk size from given file.
    <T1> GridFsUpload.GridFsUploadBuilder<T1>

    Set the id to use.
